alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 5 at 1:23PM EST until March 6 at 12:00PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow and sleet
accumulations of a coating to 2 inches in western MA, up to 4
inches in northeastern MA, and ice accumulations around one tenth
of an inch in both regions.

* WHERE...Portions of northern Connecticut, eastern, northeastern,
and western Massachusetts, and northern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...From 5 PM this afternoon to noon EST Friday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The hazardous
conditions could impact the Thursday evening and Friday morning
commutes.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 7pm, then sleet and rain between 7pm and 1am, then snow and sleet. Cloudy, with a low around 32. Northeast wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 3 to 5 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 8am, then a chance of snow and a chance of sleet between 8am and 9am, then a chance of rain between 9am and 2pm. Cloudy, with a high near 38. Northeast wind 10 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog between 7pm and 4am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 3 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog before 7am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 45. South wind 3 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 7pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 9am. Partly sunny, with a high near 53. West wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 37. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 56. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 43. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 58. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Rain Showers
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers after 4am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 40. South wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 57. South wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 40. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. West wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.
